title: rosa lutea var. sulphurea
intro: Rosa lutea var. sulphurea is a type of yellow wild rose that is native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and thorny stems. The medicinal properties of Rosa lutea var. sulphurea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Rosa lutea var. sulphurea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the flowers and leaves and then infusing them in hot water or a solvent.
